page_metadata.biotools__summary: DeepECA is an end-to-end learning framework for protein contact prediction from a multiple sequence alignment. It can be used for predicting protein contact residues and secondary structures from its amino acid sequence by using Deep Neural Network.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DeepECA is an end-to-end learning framework for protein contact prediction from a multiple sequence alignment. It can be used for predicting protein contact residues and secondary structures from its amino acid sequence by using Deep Neural Network.
